parameters.query:
SELECT brand_summary, brand_voice, ideal_customer, unique_value_proposition, words_always_use, words_never_use, proof_points
FROM client_knowledge_base
WHERE project_name = '{{ $json.projectName }}'
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO client_pages (project_name, page_url, page_title, target_keyword, wp_post_id, published_date)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.projectName }}',
  '{{ $json.wpPageUrl }}',
  '{{ $json.wpTitle }}',
  '{{ $json.targetKeyword }}',
  {{ $json.wpPageId }},
  NOW()
) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

parameters.jsonBody: ={"pageUrl": "{{ $('Check WP Response').item.json.wpPageUrl }}", "targetKeyword": "{{ $('Check WP Response').item.json.targetKeyword }}", "projectName": "{{ $('Check WP Response').item.json.projectName }}"}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, pageId: $('Check WP Response').item.json.wpPageId, pageUrl: $('Check WP Response').item.json.wpPageUrl, editUrl: $('Check WP Response').item.json.wpEditUrl, project: $('Check WP Response').item.json.projectName, keyword: $('Check WP Response').item.json.targetKeyword, keywordSalience: $('Check WP Response').item.json.keywordSalience || 0 }) }}
